bubble_watch.resume_notes: Lost ACC quarterfinal to Virginia 74-81. Had strong season but tournament exit could be costly. Most projections still have them safely in as a play-in team.
Lost SEC first round to Ole Miss 66-76. Entered at No. 44 in WAB. Loss hurts but weak bubble peers provide cover. Likely still in.
WCC runner-up to Gonzaga (lost 68-79). Strong 26-7 season. Most projections have them comfortably in the field.
Lost SEC second round to Kentucky 72-78. Bubble resume but the weak bubble field gives them a cushion.
Won Big 12 first round games but lost to Arizona 59-81 in quarterfinals. Had passed into lock status before quarterfinal loss.

Lost final four regular season games. Beat Syracuse in ACC tournament first round but fell to Louisville 58-62. Quad 1 loss to Louisville not too damaging but no resume boost either. Anxiously awaiting Selection Sunday.
Won 13 of last 14 games including critical road win at Dayton. Early loss at Saint Louis hurt but fellow bubble teams losing has given new life. A-10 tournament still ongoing.
Lost Big Ten tournament game Wednesday. Probably ends at-large hopes. Conference tournament exit likely fatal for bubble case.

Beat Mississippi State 77-61 in SEC first round (not resume-enhancing). Lost to Tennessee 62-72 in second round. Needed deeper run to justify at-large bid. Dropped from Last Four In to First Four Out.
Projects as the first team out across most bracketologies. Needs a Mountain West tournament run or bid-stealer chaos.
Lost ACC first round to Pitt 63-64. Early exit makes at-large case very difficult.
Lost ACC second round game to Wake Forest in OT. Resume not strong enough without deeper tournament run.
Only 13% at-large chances in forecast composite. Ranks outside top 50 nationally in resume average. Only one Quad 1 win. Needs Big East tournament run to survive.
Big 12 bubble team. Needs significant chaos or deep conference tournament run.
Mountain West bubble team. Would need to win MW tournament to make field.
Beat South Carolina 86-74 in SEC first round. Lost to Texas A&M area in second round. Not enough for at-large.
Lost ACC second round game to Florida State 89-95. At-large case effectively over.

projected_field_changes.reason: Lost SEC second round to Tennessee 62-72. Win over Mississippi State was not resume-enhancing. Dropped out of projected field.
Lost Big Ten tournament game. Conference tournament exit likely fatal for at-large hopes.
Passed into lock status after Big 12 tournament wins despite quarterfinal loss to Arizona.
Won Big Ten tournament games; passed into lock status despite loss to Ohio State in third round.
Lost final four regular season games then lost to Louisville in ACC second round. Slid from near-lock to anxious bubble.
Beat Iowa 72-69 in Big Ten third round. Resume bump heading into quarterfinal vs Michigan.
Lost to Ole Miss in SEC first round but weak bubble keeps them in field for now.

lunardi_espn.notes: Duke, Arizona, Michigan are locks for 1-seeds. Florida has slight edge over UConn for final 1-seed.

andy_katz_ncaa.notes: UConn dropped to No. 2 seed as Florida moved into No. 1 seed in latest projection (March 10).

cbs_sports.notes: Duke is prospective No. 1 overall. Conference tournament results could shift seeding. UConn competing with Florida for 4th No. 1.

key_seeding_notes: Duke (29-2) is unanimous No. 1 overall seed across all projections
Michigan clinched Big Ten regular season title; locked as No. 2 overall
Arizona won first Big 12 regular season title (16-2); No. 3 overall
Florida/UConn battle for 4th No. 1 seed; Florida currently holds it
St. John's won Big East outright; projected 2-seed
Gonzaga is a 2-3 seed depending on projection source
Conference tournament performance could still shift 1-seed race

key_storylines_march_12: The 2026 NCAA Tournament bubble is historically weak - struggling teams getting grace because peers are also losing
Auburn dropped from Last Four In to First Four Out after Tennessee loss
Indiana's tournament loss likely ends at-large hopes
Arizona and Iowa State cruise into Big 12 semifinals with dominant quarterfinal wins
Kentucky emerges as SEC dark horse after beating LSU and Missouri in consecutive days
Tennessee eliminated Auburn from bubble contention with 72-62 second-round win
Virginia and Miami advance in ACC; Duke and UNC play quarterfinal games tonight
St. John's handles Providence in Big East quarterfinals
Ohio State and Wisconsin win Big Ten third-round games to advance
Idaho's first NCAA Tournament bid since 1990 is the Cinderella story of Champ Week
Gonzaga's final WCC tournament ends with 27th consecutive NCAA Tournament berth
3 days until Selection Sunday (March 15) - 16 auto-bids remaining
